title: Big Hungry Chicken Pack
description: A custom resource pack with some minor modifications to the default vanilla textures
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/SCecbGB.png) ## Just a silly resource pack with some minor modifications and additions ### Most of the additions require **[Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/downloads)** or **[Optifine Alternatives](https://lambdaurora.dev/optifine_alternatives/)**

 

Hotbar with potatoes for the hungerbar:

 

Iron Golem with red flowers:

 

Happy and Sad Striders:

 

Cats: Rename a cat "Buzz" for the bee cat (on the left) or "Clara" for the attempt at making a texture of my own cat (on the right)

 

Chickens: Void Chickens will spawn randomly among regular chickens (inspired by Stardew Valley)

 

Eggs: You may also name an egg "Void Egg" to get the texture below on the right (also inspired by Stardew Valley)

 

Moobloom: You can name a regular cow a "Moobloom" but will also spawn naturally in the Flower Forest biome

 

Axolotl of Undying: Replaces the totem of undying with an Axolotl of Undying

 

Oxidized Brush: The copper on the Brush is now a nice turquoise oxidized colour

 

Turtle Shell Helmet:


You may rename a turtle shell helmet to one of the ninja turtles to get a bandana of the relevant colour

Going left to right "Raphael", "Michelangelo", "Leonardo", "Donatello"



If you wish to support me or my work feel free to do so below :)
